title: Flag committed WebServerToken and real server IP in git history
description: Models/Configs.cs line 18 commits a plaintext WebServerToken (decodes to v214_Updater credentials) and a real server IP (26.3.188.61), with stale/misleading inline comments. Flag only for now: recommend moving these to untracked runtime config (ties to the config.json work), rotating the credential, and documenting. Do NOT rewrite git history in this session.

title: Fix broken async WZ integrity check (fire-and-forget Parallel.ForEach)
description: Services/LoginService.cs around line 217 uses Parallel.ForEach(wz_files, async wz_file => {...}); the async lambda is fire-and-forget, so await GetFileChecksum runs detached and passChecksum is read before the async bodies finish. The integrity check is effectively skipped. Rewrite to properly await all checks.

title: Add .gitignore and untrack obj/, packages/, and stale v214 artifacts
description: No .gitignore exists; obj/ (including compiled exe/pdb and stale obj/Debug/v214.Launcher.WPF.* artifacts) and the restored NuGet packages/ tree are committed. Add a Visual Studio .gitignore and untrack these. Foundational cleanup for the repo.

title: Global exception handler for uncaught crashes
description: No DispatcherUnhandledException or AppDomain.UnhandledException handler exists; App.xaml.cs is empty, so crashes fall through to the generic Windows dialog. Add global handlers that log and show a friendly message. File: App.xaml.cs.

title: File-based logging to replace Console.WriteLine
description: Diagnostics currently use Console.WriteLine, which is invisible in a WinExe release build. Add file-based logging so end users and maintainers can see what happened. Files: Services/Client.cs, Services/Handlers.cs, Services/LoginService.cs.

title: Configurable game folder path with a browse picker
description: LoginService.LaunchMaple hardcodes relative MapleStory.exe and Localhost.dll under the current directory and splits on a literal backslash, so the launcher must live inside the game folder. Add a configurable game path plus a browse-for-folder dialog. File: Services/LoginService.cs (LaunchMaple, around line 224).

title: Externalize server config (IP/port/LocalLogin) to runtime config.json
description: Server IP, port, and LocalLogin are hardcoded in Models/Configs.cs and require editing code and recompiling to change. Load these from a runtime config.json at startup, falling back to current baked-in defaults. Files: Models/Configs.cs, Services/LoginService.cs, MainWindow.xaml.cs. Biggest single usability win.

title: Fix 256-byte fixed packet buffer overflow
description: Models/InPacket.cs and Models/OutPacket.cs use fixed new byte[256] buffers; any packet, string, or login token over 256 bytes causes silent corruption or IndexOutOfRangeException. Make buffers grow or bounds-check.

title: Add socket timeouts and stop sharing static ManualResetEvents
description: Services/Client.cs uses shared static ManualResetEvents (connectDone/sendDone/receiveDone) across all instances and calls WaitOne() with no timeout, so a hung server can leave the UI stuck in SIGNING IN... forever. Add timeouts and per-instance sync primitives.

title: Improve README onboarding and add LICENSE + CONTRIBUTING
description: README onboarding is terse and there is no LICENSE or CONTRIBUTING. Add concrete build/run steps and the missing project files to lower the barrier for contributors.

title: BGM temp-file cleanup and unique filename
description: InitializeBgm extracts bgm.mp3 to %TEMP%/RoyalStory_bgm.mp3 on every launch, never cleans it up, and the fixed name can lock or collide across instances. Use a unique temp name and clean up on exit. File: MainWindow.xaml.cs around line 591.

title: Reconnect/retry button when server is offline
description: Connection is one-shot at startup (InitializeConnection); if the server was down and later comes online, status stays Offline until app restart. Add a reconnect/retry button and/or auto-retry. File: MainWindow.xaml.cs.

title: Faster startup: do not block ~8s on GIF load before showing UI
description: MainWindow_Loaded blocks up to ~8s waiting for both animated GIF backgrounds to load before revealing the UI, hurting perceived launch speed. Reveal UI first and load/animate backgrounds asynchronously. File: MainWindow.xaml.cs (around lines 68-78).

title: Show/hide password toggle on login and register
description: Password fields have no reveal toggle, common on modern launchers. Add a show/hide eye toggle to both forms. File: MainWindow.xaml + MainWindow.xaml.cs.

title: Consolidate MessageBox errors into inline validation and a status area
description: Login, register, connection, and launch errors are all surfaced via scattered MessageBox.Show dialogs with no inline validation. Move to inline field validation plus a status area for smoother feedback. Files: MainWindow.xaml.cs, Services/LoginService.cs.

title: Replace silent empty catch blocks with logged failures
description: Many empty catch {} blocks hide config/BGM/connection load and save failures, so a failed write gives the user no feedback. Log these instead. File: MainWindow.xaml.cs (LoadThemePreference, SaveUsername, LoadBgmPreferences, SaveBgmPreferences, InitializeBgm, InitializeConnection).

title: In-app Settings panel to edit config without touching files
description: Optional UI to edit the runtime config (server, game path, LocalLogin) from inside the launcher instead of hand-editing config.json. Depends on the runtime config work.

title: Relax brittle magic WZ count == 26 check
description: Services/LoginService.cs lines ~204-213 abort launch with a scary dialog unless exactly 26 .wz files are present. Any legitimate variance breaks launch. Make the expected count configurable or the check more tolerant.

title: Add GitHub Actions build workflow for PR validation
description: No CI exists. Add a GitHub Actions workflow that builds the solution with MSBuild on push/PR so breakage is caught. Depends on the .gitignore cleanup landing first.

title: Modernize legacy csproj to SDK-style with PackageReference
description: The legacy non-SDK .csproj vendors packages/ via packages.config. Migrate to an SDK-style project using PackageReference so restore is automatic and the repo is smaller. File: v232.Launcher.WPF.csproj.

title: Bind footer version string to assembly version
description: Footer shows a hardcoded v1.0.0.14 (MainWindow.xaml line 99) separate from the assembly version, so it drifts. Bind it to the assembly version.

title: Fix hardcoded avatar initial (always shows U)
description: The logged-in panel avatar shows a hardcoded Text=U regardless of the username. Bind it to the first letter of the logged-in username. File: MainWindow.xaml around line 255.
